/usr/bin/g++ -fprofile-arcs -ftest-coverage -O0 -g -Wdeprecated-declarations -fPIC -g -Wdeprecated-declarations -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -fprofile-arcs -ftest-coverage CMakeFiles/test_logutils_app_log.dir/AppLogTest.cpp.o -o /Users/charlesbenjamin/moos-ivp-cicd-testing/bin/test_logutils_app_log   -L/Users/charlesbenjamin/moos-ivp/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/charlesbenjamin/moos-ivp/lib ../../../../lib/libgtest_main.a -llogutils -lmbutil ../../../../lib/libgtest.a
